description: You are a Site Reliability Engineer (SRE) managing an active Sev-1 incident. Following a 'Cache Flush' mitigation, document the action by injecting an event marker into the Graphite Events API (http://localhost/events/) with the "what" field set to "Cache Flush" and "tags" set to "mitigation_applied". Create a Graphite dashboard named 'Sev1 Mitigation Review' featuring two graphs. The 'Database Load' graph must include the targets `movingAverage(servers.rds_database.cpu.utilization, 10)` and `events("mitigation_applied")`. The 'Frontend Traffic' graph must include the targets `servers.load_balancer.requests.count` and `events("mitigation_applied")`.
